subcodes.first_line: From the time of thy return until now, outwardly no tidings have been received from thee, until this moment when Muhammad-Qabl- [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از حین مراجعت تا حال بر حسب ظاهر از شما خبری نرسید تا در این وقت که محمد قبل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
